texto: The degeneration of the revolution in Russia does not pass from the revolution for communism to the revolution for a developed kind of capitalism, but to a pure capitalist revo­lution. It runs in parallel with world-wide capitalist domination which, by successive steps, eliminates old feudal and Asiatic forms in various zones. While the historical situation in the seventeenth, eighteenth and nineteenth centuries caused the capitalist revolution to take liberal forms, in the twentieth century it must have totalitarian and bureaucratic ones.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Amadeo Bordiga sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. A afirmação “The degeneration of the revolution in Russia does not pass from the revolution for communism to t…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a sucesso, 20th-century, capitalism, útil em momentos de capitalism e chinese-revolution.

While the historical situation in the seventeenth, eighteenth and nineteenth centuries caused the capitalist revolution to take liberal forms, in the twentieth century it must have totalitarian and bureaucratic ones.

texto: There cannot exist in the future an economy which is still mercantile but which isn't capitalist anymore. Before capitalism there were economies which were partially mercantile, but capitalism is the last of this genre.
explicacao: Citação de Amadeo Bordiga sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “There cannot exist in the future an economy which is still mercantile but which isn't capitalist …” articula reflexao, abc-of-communism, capitalism em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como capitalism e commodity-production.

texto: The whole discussion now underway on revolutionary forms in Russia and in China boils down to the judgement to be made of the historical phenomenon of the "appearance" of industrialism and mechanisation in huge areas of the world previously dominated by landed and precapitalist forms of production.Constructing industrialism and mechanising things is supposedly the same as building socialism whenever central and "national" plans are made. This is the mistaken thesis.
explicacao: Citação de Amadeo Bordiga sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “The whole discussion now underway on revolutionary forms in Russia and in China boils down to the…” articula reflexao, capitalism, communism em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como communism e industrialization.

texto: To exploit living labour, capital must destroy dead labour which is still useful. Loving to suck warm young blood, it kills corpses.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Amadeo Bordiga sobre temas ligados a vida. A afirmação “To exploit living labour, capital must destroy dead labour which is still useful. Loving to suck …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a vida, capitalism, crisis, útil em momentos de crisis.

texto: The place of the worst barbarism is that modern forest that makes use of us, this forest of chimneys and bayonets, machines and weapons, of strange inanimate beasts that feed on human flesh.
explicacao: Citação de Amadeo Bordiga sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The place of the worst barbarism is that modern forest that makes use of us, this forest of chimn…” articula reflexao, capitalism, commodity-production em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como commodity-production e modernity.
